prompt: Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department

inputData.question: Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show the distribution of credit values for courses in each department"},"startedAt":1771856152738,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see the distribution of credit values for courses in each department. This requires joining the courses table with the departments table and grouping by department to show how credits are distributed. I'll use aggregation functions to show the distribution: count of courses, min/max/average credits, and potentially a breakdown by credit value.","sql":"
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  c.credits,
  COUNT(*) AS course_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code, c.credits
ORDER BY d.name, c.credits
","assumptions":["The 'credits' column in the courses table represents the credit value for each course","A distribution view shows the count of courses for each credit value within each department","Departments are identified by their name and code"]},"endedAt":1771856185044},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Distribution of Credit Values for Courses by Department

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  c.credits,
  COUNT(*) AS course_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code, c.credits
ORDER BY d.name, c.credits

data.department_name: Wydział Informatyki i Nauki o Materiałach

visualization.title: Distribution of Credit Values for Courses by Department

result.sql:
SELECT 
  d.name AS department_name,
  d.code AS department_code,
  c.credits,
  COUNT(*) AS course_count
FROM courses c
INNER JOIN departments d ON c.department_id = d.id
GROUP BY d.id, d.name, d.code, c.credits
ORDER BY d.name, c.credits
